title: Complete MERN Stack Development
description: Learn MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js by building real-world full stack applications from scratch.

title: Advanced Next.js Masterclass
description: Master Next.js App Router, Server Actions, Authentication, Deployment, and scalable architecture.

title: Node.js Backend Engineering
description: Build secure REST APIs using Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, and modern backend architecture.

title: UI/UX Design Bootcamp
description: Learn modern UI/UX principles, Figma design systems, wireframing, and responsive layouts.

title: DevOps & CI/CD Pipeline
description: Understand Docker, GitHub Actions, Linux servers, CI/CD workflows, and deployment strategies.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Learn Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and machine learning basics for data analysis.

title: Cyber Security Essentials
description: Explore ethical hacking, web security, authentication systems, and vulnerability testing.

title: React Native App Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and Expo framework.
